fixture.description: Pagination uses a 1-based page number but computes the slice start as page * pageSize instead of (page - 1) * pageSize, so page 1 silently skips the first page of results.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags the off-by-one in pageOf: `page` is documented as 1-based but `start = page * pageSize` skips the first page (page 1 starts at index pageSize, not 0). It should recommend `start = (page - 1) * pageSize`. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the off-by-one / wrong slice start is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags the off-by-one: 1-based page with start = page * pageSize
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT claim slice() bounds handling is itself wrong
Does NOT require a runtime crash — the bug is wrong results
